full_text:
Shen Dan (Yiju) 申耽 (義舉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen Dan (申耽), styledYiju (義舉), was born in Hanzhong. Brother of Shen Yi. Governor of Shangyong. Surrendered from Wei to Shu to Wei. Shen Dan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom.
